data.title: Generac named finalist for Wisconsin Manufacturer of the Year. Highlights 65-year commitment to manufacturing in Wisconsin.
data.description: Generac Holdings Inc., a prominent global company (NYSE: GNRC) known for its energy technology solutions, has recently been recognized for its 65-year dedication to Wisconsin's manufacturing, innovation, and community impact. The acknowledgment signifies Generac's longstanding commitment to these areas and reinforces the company's influence in the industry. The recognition was announced in Waukesha, Wisconsin on February 20, 2026.

data.title: Doseology Sciences appoints Larry Latowsky as Executive Chairman, effective February 18.
data.description: In Vancouver on February 20, 2026, Doseology Sciences Inc. (CSE: MOOD) (PINK: DOSEF) (FSE: VU70) appointed Larry Latowsky as a director and Executive Chairman of its Board of Directors on February 18.

data.title: Oil States International, Inc. reports 8% revenue growth in Q4 2025 with $178.4K earnings, but operating loss at $113.6K.
data.description: Houston-based Oil States International, Inc. (NYSE: OIS) reported its financial results for the three months ending December 31, 2025, showing a revenue of $178,464 thousand which marked an 8% increase from the previous quarter and a year-over-year increase of 8%. However, the company reported an operating loss of $113,635 thousand for this period, contrasting with an operating income of $4,748 thousand in the quarter ending September 30, 2025, and $18,484 thousand in the same period of 2024. The adjusted operating income, excluding charges and credits, was $10,973 thousand for the period. These results depict a significant shift in the company's financial performance compared to earlier periods.

data.title: BWXT appoints Dan Jablonsky to board of directors effective March 2, 2026. He will serve on audit and finance committee.
data.description: BWX Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: BWXT) based in Melbourne, Florida shared that Dan Jablonsky is joining their board of directors starting March 2, 2026. Additionally, he will be a part of the audit and finance committee. Jablonsky previously held the positions of CEO and chairman at Ursa Major, a respected company specializing in advanced propulsion systems for space and defense purposes. With over a decade of experience in the aerospace and defense sector, Jablonsky brings valuable expertise to the BWX team.

data.title: Fennec Pharmaceuticals shares data showing PEDMARK® safe for adult head & neck cancer treatment, integrating easily.
data.description: A recent study found that the administration of PEDMARK about six hours after cisplatin was demonstrated to be safe and easily incorporated into care for adults diagnosed with head and neck cancers. This new treatment regimen shows promising results in improving outcomes for patients with HNC. The study involved a significant number of participants and showcased the potential benefits of this approach in managing HNC. Overall, the findings suggest that integrating PEDMARK approximately six hours post-cisplatin administration could be a beneficial strategy in the treatment of adults with head and neck cancers.

data.title: Novo Nordisk A/S announces annual general meeting with details on agenda and key dates.
data.description: A recent report reveals that nearly 2,500 employees in the tech industry have been affected by layoffs in the past month. This surge in job cuts is attributed to the economic challenges posed by the ongoing pandemic. The companies that have downsized their workforce include major tech giants, with some making significant reductions in their staff. The impact of these layoffs has caused concern among industry experts and workers alike, as they navigate the uncertainties of the current job market. The tech sector, known for its rapid growth and innovative opportunities, is now facing a period of instability as companies adjust to the new normal.

data.title: Frontline plc will release Q4 2025 results on Feb 27, a webcast and call will be held at 3:00 p.m. CET/9:00 a.m. ET.
data.description: Frontline plc. is set to announce its preliminary fourth quarter 2025 results on Friday, February 27, 2026. Investors can tune in to a webcast and conference call scheduled for 3:00 p.m. CET (9:00 a.m. U.S. Eastern Time) on the same day. The presentation of the results will be accessible for download on the Investor Relations webpage at www.frontlineplc.cy before the conference call.

data.title: Citi Trends, Inc. (NASDAQ: CTRN) announced board changes and extension of cooperation agreement with Fund 1 Investments, LLC.
data.description: Citi Trends, Inc. (NASDAQ: CTRN), a prominent off-price value retailer specializing in apparel, accessories, and home trends for Black families in the US, has revealed several governance and shareholder updates. This includes a Board transition, a change in Finance Committee leadership, and the extension of its collaboration agreement with Fund 1 Investments, LLC. Wes Calvert has departed from the company.

data.title: J&J plans to sell DePuy Synthes orthopedics unit after acquiring it for $21.3 billion in 2011. Targeting completion in 18-24 months.
data.description: Johnson & Johnson (NYSE: JNJ) is reportedly getting ready to potentially sell its orthopedics unit, DePuy Synthes, as part of its plan to separate the business. The medtech giant had acquired DePuy Synthes in 2011 for a staggering $21.3 billion. The company announced in October 2025 that it intends to separate its Orthopedics business to improve strategic and operational focus, aiming to complete the process within 18 to 24 months. Bloomberg reported that CFO Joseph Wolk mentioned the company had not yet determined the method of the split but was gearing up for a potential spinoff. For more information, the full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Ardelyx stock drops despite sales growth. Company reports $274.2 million revenue for IBSRELA in 2025, expects $410-$430 million in 2026.
data.description: Ardelyx Inc. (NASDAQ: ARDX) reported breakeven earnings for the fourth quarter of 2025, beating consensus expectations of 1 cent per share. Sales reached $125.22 million, surpassing the consensus estimate of $118.13 million. The company's key drug, IBSRELA (tenapanor), saw revenues grow by 73% in 2025 to $274.2 million, contributing to total revenues of $407.3 million. In the fourth quarter, IBSRELA revenue reached $86.6 million, marking a 61% increase year over year. Ardelyx anticipates IBSRELA revenues for full-year 2026 to be between $410 million and $430 million, aiming for at least a 50% growth compared to 2025. This growth is attributed to increased prescribing by healthcare providers and enhanced engagement with IBS-C patients. The company expects IBSRELA to reach $1 billion in annual revenue by 2029. XPHOZAH (another drug by Ardelyx) had revenues of $103.6 million in 2025, reflecting growth in total dispenses. The full article is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: AdvanSix (ASIX) beats earnings estimates by 150%, reports $0.03 EPS and $30.88M increase in revenue YoY.
data.description: AdvanSix (NYSE: ASIX) released its Q4 financial results on Friday, February 20, 2026, at 06:30 AM, surpassing expectations. The company reported an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.03, beating the estimated earnings of $-0.06 by an impressive 150.0%. Additionally, AdvanSix saw a growth in revenue, increasing by $30.88 million compared to the corresponding period last year. For further details and a comprehensive analysis of the company's past earnings, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: PG&E declares $0.05 per share dividend for Q1 2026, payable on April 15 to shareholders of record by March.
data.description: In Oakland, California, on February 19, 2026, PG&E Corporation (NYSE: PCG) announced a regular cash dividend of $0.05 per share for the first quarter of 2026. This dividend will be paid on April 15, 2026, to shareholders who are recorded as such as of March __, 2026.
